url_parts_t(3) Library Functions Manual url_parts_t(3)

NAME

url_parts_t - Structure containing parsed URL components.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/util/url.h>

Data Fields


char * scheme
Extracted scheme: http"orhttps(allocated). char * userinfo
Optional userinfo (user:pass) - may be NULL (allocated if present). char * host
Extracted hostname or IP address (allocated). char * ipv6
IPv6 address if host is bracketed IPv6 - may be NULL (allocated if present). int port
Extracted port number (0 if not specified). char * path
Extracted path, query, and fragment (allocated if present, may be NULL).

Detailed Description

Structure containing parsed URL components.

Note

All string fields are allocated with SAFE_MALLOC() and must be freed by caller

Definition at line 57 of file url.h.

Field Documentation

char* url_parts_t::host

Extracted hostname or IP address (allocated).

Referenced by connection_attempt_tcp(), parse_public_key(), server_connection_establish(), url_parse(), and url_parts_destroy().

IPv6 address if host is bracketed IPv6 - may be NULL (allocated if present).

Referenced by url_parse(), and url_parts_destroy().

Extracted path, query, and fragment (allocated if present, may be NULL).
